meaning: (The) Third World Academy of Sciences 第三世界科学院
examples: Twas he cut off my arm.
Twas she that hath disturbed your Highness.
"Twas your own orders," the bo'sun faltered.
Sixth General Conference of the Third World Academy of Sciences (TWAS), Rio de Janeiro (Brasil), 6-11 September 1997.
We'll withhold judgment until we see what comes out of this 'twas-the-night-before-IPO hackathon.
